infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: EZjobsite uses the camera so you can snap a photo of a jobsite decision instead of writing it up.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: EZjobsite attaches photos you pick to the decision they belong to.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: EZjobsite records what you say on site so you do not have to type it.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: EZjobsite stamps each photo with where it was taken, so it is evidence of what happened on this job.

plugins.microphonePermission: EZjobsite records jobsite decisions so nothing gets lost.
